entries.name: mui:mui-architect
entries.intent: Design MUI theme systems and component library architecture

entries.name: mui:mui-design-system-architect
entries.intent: Design enterprise design systems with token hierarchies, multi-tenant themes, and Pigment CSS

entries.name: mui:mui-x-specialist
entries.intent: Expert on MUI X premium components — DataGrid Pro/Premium, DatePicker, Charts, TreeView

entries.name: mui:mui-performance-optimizer
entries.intent: Analyze and optimize MUI bundle size, render performance, DataGrid perf, and SSR efficiency

entries.name: mui:mui-a11y-auditor
entries.intent: Audit MUI applications for WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance with auto-fix

entries.name: mui:mui-reviewer
entries.intent: Code review MUI implementations for best practices, accessibility, and performance

entries.name: mui:mui-migration-specialist
entries.intent: Analyze and execute MUI version migrations (v4→v5, v5→v6)
